ui_strings.title: MISSION CLERAC
ui_strings.instructions: Collect Chamotte Clay & Band Migratory Birds! Avoid Blasting Zone!
ui_strings.intro_story: Imerys needs you at the Clerac clay quarry. Haul Chamotte Clay to keep the plant running - but the pit is alive with migratory birds tracked by the MNHN. Collect ore, shield the wildlife, and steer clear of the blasting zones.
eco_facts: Bird-banding programs with MNHN help monitor migratory species.
Chestnut groves are left unmined to provide shelter for bats.
The unmined groves also provide a safe habitat for local birds.
Protecting groves is essential for the insects that birds and bats feed on.
ui_strings.end_recap: Like Imerys at Clerac, you supported bird monitoring with the MNHN through the ACRO-bag program.
